name: feature-flags
summary: Supabase-driven remote flags + percentage rollout, cached locally, with a useFlag hook. Flip features without an app update. Key-free.
postInstall: Apply supabase/0010_feature_flags.sql (public-read feature_flags; edit rows from the dashboard)
Wrap the app in <FlagsProvider>, then const on = useFlag('new_checkout').
Rollout is deterministic per user (stable hash of uid+key), so a user's bucket doesn't flicker.
